name: Slurm Maintenance Reservation Triage
summary: Collect read-only Slurm evidence for maintenance windows and reservations.
description: This skill helps users and support teams distinguish planned maintenance, advanced reservations, drained nodes, down partitions, and unavailable resources from job-script or application failures using read-only Slurm commands.

tools.name: scontrol
tools.notes: Reservation and node detail visibility varies by site.

inputs.name: job_id
inputs.description: Optional Slurm job id or array task id whose pending reason should be inspected.

inputs.name: partition
inputs.description: Optional Slurm partition to scope sinfo output.

inputs.name: node_name
inputs.description: Optional Slurm node name to inspect with scontrol when available.

inputs.name: reservation_name
inputs.description: Optional Slurm reservation name to inspect with scontrol when available.

outputs.name: maintenance_reservation_report
outputs.description: Read-only Slurm queue, node state, unavailable-node reason, and reservation evidence for support review.

outputs.name: handoff_checklist
outputs.description: A checklist for deciding whether the evidence points to planned maintenance, reservation policy, drained nodes, partition state, or a user request mismatch.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example artifacts.
Check shell syntax without contacting a scheduler.
Run on a Slurm site during a known maintenance or reservation window and confirm it only reads scheduler state.
